name: AutoCompletionNodeMachineLearningInfo
summary: This class will support the Machine Learning info related to a node element of Auto-completion feature.

constructors.name: AutoCompletionNodeMachineLearningInfo(bool, bool, double)
constructors.signature: void AutoCompletionNodeMachineLearningInfo(bool displayIcon, bool isByRecommendation, double confidenceScore)
constructors.summary: Creates ML info object using DisplayIcon, IsByRecommendation and ConfidenceScore params

params.name: displayIcon
params.doc: True if the user can view the confidence score or the recent use icon, otherwise False

params.name: isByRecommendation
params.doc: True if the Node is part of the ML recommendation, otherwise False

properties.name: DisplayIcon
properties.summary: Indicates if the icon is displayed to show the condifent score or by-usage

properties.name: IsByRecommendation
properties.summary: Indicates if the Node is part of the ML result per recommendation

properties.name: IsByUse
properties.summary: Indicates if the Node is part of ML result per use
